# MuleSoft Java Module

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (2.0) of Java Module documentation.
> See [Java Module llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/java-module/llms-full.txt) for all the Java Module documentation in one file.

## Content

- [Configure the Java Module Using Anypoint Code Builder](https://docs.mulesoft.com/java-module/latest/configure-java-module-acb.md)
- [Java Module 2.0](https://docs.mulesoft.com/java-module/latest/index.md)
- [Argument Transformation](https://docs.mulesoft.com/java-module/latest/java-argument-transformation.md)
- [Create an Instance of a Class](https://docs.mulesoft.com/java-module/latest/java-create-instance.md)
- [Test for an Instance of a Class](https://docs.mulesoft.com/java-module/latest/java-instanceof.md)
- [Invoke Methods](https://docs.mulesoft.com/java-module/latest/java-invoke-method.md)
- [Java Module Examples](https://docs.mulesoft.com/java-module/latest/java-module-examples.md)
- [Troubleshooting Java Module](https://docs.mulesoft.com/java-module/latest/java-module-troubleshooting.md)
- [Upgrading and Migrating Java Module to Version 2.x](https://docs.mulesoft.com/java-module/latest/java-module-upgrade-migrate.md)
- [Work With Throwables](https://docs.mulesoft.com/java-module/latest/java-throwable.md)
- [Java Module XML and Maven Support](https://docs.mulesoft.com/java-module/latest/java-xml-maven.md)
